defaultMissionText: I need two AA batteries delivered to my East Village office. Match someone already passing nearby.
missionExamples: I need two AA batteries delivered to my East Village office. Match someone already passing nearby.
Bring one phone charger to the East Village office with the smallest added trip.
I need one umbrella delivered to the Greenpoint apartment by someone already going that way.
Deliver two AA batteries to the Greenpoint apartment within a small detour.
Bring one phone charger to my East Village office through a nearby journey.
